title: clinopodium grandiflorum subsp. grandiflorum
intro: Clinopodium grandiflorum subsp. grandiflorum, also known as Clinopodium grandiflorum, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the Himalayas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Clinopodium grandiflorum subsp. grandiflorum include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in essential oil form to harness its therapeutic properties.
